name: payer_policies
description: Per-CPT medical-necessity policies. check_payer_policy looks up the CPT and evaluates each criterion against the request's clinical facts.
_TODO_step_4: Define a policy per CPT you want to support. Each criterion is evaluated by check_payer_policy (Step 8).
A criterion is: {id, name, path (dotted path into the request, e.g. 'clinical.conservative_tx_weeks'), op (one of >=, >, <=, <, ==, !=), value}.
meets_policy is true only when every criterion passes.
Provide policies for the CPTs in sample-data: 72148 (lumbar MRI), 29881 (knee arthroscopy), 70553 (brain MRI).
The `healthcare-solution` branch holds the reference policies.
